calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Julie Gardner / Defendant in Pro Per;
William Keith Sutton / Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A -Repair Costs
Exhibit B -Check for sent Aug 29th for $2850.01

Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Text message exchange June 16th
Exhibit 2 - Envelope postmarked October 14th

At the conclusion of the hearing, The Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. Judge: Sharon Reardon; Clerk: Kevin Rayala; Reporter: NONE (624).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-28-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julie Gardner, Appellant/Defendant; Eugene Gardner, witness/son. No appearance by Plaintiff/Respondent William Sutton.

The Court reports reports receipt of a request to continue the hearing from Respondent William Sutton. In his absence, the Court will continue the hearing. Appellant Gardner reports that she will be leaving the country for two months at the end of April 2022. The Court determines to continue the hearing July 12, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 624 and reminds Ms. Gardner to be prepared to address the late filing of the appeal at that time. Mr. Gardner advises the Court of additional facts regarding the late filing but the Court notes in the absence of Mr. Sutton, she is not permitted to consider them at this time.

Judge: Hon. Sharon Reardon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D624)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Continued To Apr-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julie Gardner, Appellant/Defendant; Eugene Gardner, witness/son. No appearance by Plaintiff/Respondent William Sutton.

The Court advises Ms. Gardner that the record shows the appeal was filed late. The Court would offer Ms. Gardner an opportunity to explain the late filing and offer Mr. Sutton an opportunity to object. However, in the absence of Mr. Sutton, the Court would either have to dismiss teh appeal due to the late filing or continue the hearing so that both partys could discuss the late filing and possibly proceed with the appeal. The Court determines to continue the hearing until April 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 624 but advises Ms. Gardner to be prepared to address the late filing of the appeal.

Judge: Hon. Sharon Reardon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D624)
